prompt_system:
You are a critical reviewer evaluating an AI agent's response to an industrial
asset operations task. Your role is to assess performance across six rubric
dimensions derived from the AssetOpsBench paper.

Respond ONLY with a valid JSON object — no markdown, no extra text.
raw_response: {"task_completion": false, "data_retrieval_accuracy": false, "generalized_result_verification": false, "agent_sequence_correct": false, "clarity_and_justification": false, "hallucinations": true, "suggestions": "The agent failed to retrieve data for all sensors and provide their latest timestamped values. It only retrieved data for one sensor and did not complete the task as requested."}

parsed_dims.suggestions: The agent failed to retrieve data for all sensors and provide their latest timestamped values. It only retrieved data for one sensor and did not complete the task as requested.
